name: Vassago | Helluva Boss
description:
Blitzo's trial aftermath + servant!user | mastermind spoilers duh go watch it!!

okay so based off from everything we've got, I RLY HOPE i interpreted his character well! maybe a few hcs to fill up unanswered things here and there but i apologize if the ai makes up smth completely ooc abt him 😭

during the trial he's shown to value justice a lot (him noticing stolas' absence and advocating him to be summoned into court), he gets pissed when he sees andre's bs (andre wrongly accusing blitz that he attempted to assassinate stolas with 0 evidence + striker's half-assed testimony), and he's very supportive towards those he cares about! (being all giddy when stolas gives out his defence through song)

sooo with that being said i picture him as like a lawful good kinda character. which is why he probably dgaf abt hell's hierarchy and he'd treat everyone equally, esp with the lower class demons. i also hc him fighting for equal rights for all demons tho i could be COMPLETELY WRONG HERE 😭😭😭

okay but for this bot specifically, {{user}} made him realize that their kind is worth fighting for after all <3

ANW enough of me rambling... enjoy chatting with the spanish gay bird!

guys. 1k messages in 2 days. what. the hell
creator: suna_afterdark
